# Template Parameter Differ

## What
Extend the template tracker to diff parameter key-value pairs when a template is present in both revisions. Produce `template_parameter_changed` events.

## Why
The template tracker (`template-tracker.ts`) detects `{{Infobox}}` added/removed and classifies template types (citation, neutrality, dispute, etc.). But it doesn't diff parameters. When `{{Infobox character}}` is present in both revisions but `|status=alive` changed to `|status=deceased`, that's a significant editorial event hidden inside template syntax. Infobox parameters carry structured data â€” affiliation changes, birth date corrections, status transitions â€” all deterministic signals the tracker currently discards.

On Wikipedia, `{{Infobox person}}` parameter changes track factual corrections. On fandom wikis, `{{Infobox character}}` parameter changes track canon-era shifts, character attribute changes, and in-universe status transitions.

## Context
Read first:
- `packages/analyzers/src/template-tracker.ts` â€” `extractTemplates`, `diffTemplates`, `parseParams`, `Template` type with `params?: Record<string, string>`
- `packages/evidence-graph/src/schemas/evidence.ts` â€” `EventType` union (needs new member), `EvidenceEvent`
- `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts` â€” barrel exports, `Template` type is already exported

## Implementation
1. Add `"template_parameter_changed"` to the `EventType` union in evidence.ts
2. Add a function to `packages/analyzers/src/template-tracker.ts` (extend existing file):
   ```ts
   export interface ParamChange {
     templateName: string;
     paramName: string;
     oldValue?: string;
     newValue?: string;
   }
   export function diffTemplateParams(before: Template[], after: Template[]): ParamChange[]
   ```
3. Logic:
   - For each template present in both revisions (matched by normalized name)
   - Compare `params` key-by-key
   - Parameter added â†’ `oldValue: undefined, newValue: "..."` 
   - Parameter removed â†’ `oldValue: "...", newValue: undefined`
   - Parameter changed â†’ both populated
4. Add `buildParamChangeEvents(beforeTemplates: Template[], afterTemplates: Template[], fromRevId: number, toRevId: number, timestamp: string): EvidenceEvent[]`
5. Integrate into `runAnalyze` in `packages/cli/src/commands/analyze.ts`: after `diffTemplates`, for each "unchanged" template, run `diffTemplateParams` and emit events
6. Export new types and functions from `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts`

## Invariants
- L1 only â€” deterministic parameter diff, no model
- Only diffs params on templates marked `"unchanged"` by `diffTemplates` â€” templates that appeared/disappeared between revisions already produce events
- Empty-string params and undefined params are treated as equivalent (MediaWiki allows both)
- Parameter names are normalized (lowercase, whitespace trimmed) for comparison

## Acceptance
- [ ] Gate: `bun run build && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test`
- [ ] Write tests in `packages/analyzers/src/__tests__/template-tracker.test.ts`:
  - Same template, one param changed â†’ one `template_parameter_changed` event
  - Same template, param added â†’ event with undefined `oldValue`
  - Same template, param removed â†’ event with undefined `newValue`
  - No params changed â†’ zero events
  - Template not present in both revisions â†’ not processed by param differ
- [ ] Verify integration: run `wikihistory analyze Earth --depth brief` and check for `template_parameter_changed` events
- [ ] Exported from `packages/analyzers/src/index.ts`
- [ ] Update ROADMAP.md status for L1-09 to `done`
